ddls:
CREATE TABLE "solvers" (
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solver */,
  "solver_name" TEXT /* Name of the solver */,
  "solver_type" TEXT /* Type of solver (e.g., SAT, SMT, CSP) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the solver */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the solver */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the solver is distributed */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL to the solver's source code repository */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the solver was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem */,
  "problem_name" TEXT /* Name of the problem */,
  "problem_type" TEXT /* Type of problem (e.g., SAT, SMT, CSP) */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the problem (e.g., mathematical, logical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the problem */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source or origin of the problem */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the problem */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the problem was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solver_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solver associated with this configuration */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem associated with this configuration */,
  "params" TEXT /* Parameter settings for the solver */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solver_configurations_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES benchmark_problems ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solver_configurations_solver_id FOREIGN KEY ("solver_id") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solver associated with this metric */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem associated with this metric */,
  "error_score" REAL /* Error score of the solver on this problem */,
  "correctly_solved_score" REAL /* Correctly solved score of the solver on this problem */,
  "avg_cpu_time" REAL /* Average CPU time taken by the solver on this problem */,
  "avg_wall_time" REAL /* Average wall time taken by the solver on this problem */,
  "max_cpu_time" REAL /* Maximum CPU time taken by the solver on this problem */,
  "max_wall_time" REAL /* Maximum wall time taken by the solver on this problem */,
  "min_cpu_time" REAL /* Minimum CPU time taken by the solver on this problem */,
  "min_wall_time" REAL /* Minimum wall time taken by the solver on this problem */,
  "std_dev_cpu_time" REAL /* Standard deviation of CPU time taken by the solver on this problem */,
  "std_dev_wall_time" REAL /* Standard deviation of wall time taken by the solver on this problem */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used for this performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_solver_id FOREIGN KEY ("solver_id") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES benchmark_problems ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES solver_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last logged in */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, developer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "upload_history" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the solver or problem */,
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solver or problem uploaded */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Problem ID associated with the solver upload */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the upload */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of upload (e.g., solver, problem) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the upload */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the upload (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solver_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solver associated with this result */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem associated with this result */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the solver on this problem (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the solver on this problem */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was created */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used for this result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solver_results_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES solver_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solver_results_solver_id FOREIGN KEY ("solver_id") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solver_results_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES benchmark_problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solver_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solver associated with this tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solver_tags_solver_id FOREIGN KEY ("solver_id") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem associated with this tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_tags_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES benchmark_problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solver associated with this comment */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem associated with this comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., solver, problem) */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_solver_id FOREIGN KEY ("solver_id") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES benchmark_problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solver associated with this rating */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem associated with this rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was given */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., solver, problem) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES benchmark_problems ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_solver_id FOREIGN KEY ("solver_id") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solver_config_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solver associated with this option */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the option */,
  "option_type" TEXT /* Type of the option (e.g., string, integer) */,
  "option_value" TEXT /* Value of the option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the configuration option */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the configuration option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solver_config_options_solver_id FOREIGN KEY ("solver_id") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instance */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem associated with this instance */,
  "instance_name" TEXT /* Name of the instance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the instance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the instance was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_instances_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES benchmark_problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solver_instance_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solver associated with this result */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instance associated with this result */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the solver on this instance (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the solver on this instance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was created */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used for this result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solver_instance_results_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES solver_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solver_instance_results_solver_id FOREIGN KEY ("solver_id") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solver_instance_results_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES problem_instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_instance_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instance associated with this tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_instance_tags_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES problem_instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solver_instance_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solver associated with this tag */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instance associated with this tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solver_instance_tags_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES problem_instances ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solver_instance_tags_solver_id FOREIGN KEY ("solver_id") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id")
)
